""},    stream_mode="custom",):    print(f"  自定义数据: {chunk}")# ============================================================# 演示2: ["updates", "custom"] —— 同时获取状态更新和自定义数据# ============================================================print(f"\n{'=' * 60}")print("演示2: ['updates', 'custom'] —— 同时获取状态更新和自定义数据")print("=" * 60)for chunk in graph.stream(    {"topic": "LangGraph", "result": ""},    stream_mode=["updates", "custom"],    version="v2",):    if chunk["type"] == "custom":        data = chunk["data"]        print(f"  [custom]  stage={data['stage']}, progress={data.get('progress', '-')}")    elif chunk["type"] == "updates":        for node_name, node_data in chunk["data"].items():            print(f"  [updates] 节点 [{node_name}] 返回: {node_data}")# ============================================================# 演示3: 多节点图 —— 每个节点发送不同的自定义数据# ============================================================print(f"\n{'=' * 60}")print("演示3: 多节点图 —— 每个节点发送不同的自定义数据")print("=" * 60)class PipelineState(TypedDict):    query: str    docs: list[str]    summary: strdef search_node(state: PipelineState):    writer = get_stream_writer()    writer({"event": "search_start", "query": state["query"]})    docs = [        "LangGraph 是一个用于构建有状态 AI 应用的框架",        "LangGraph 支持检查点、人机交互等高级功能",        "LangGraph 与 LangChain 生态深度集成",    ]    writer({"event": "search_done", "count": len(docs)})    return {"docs": docs}def summarize_node(state: PipelineState):    writer = get_stream_writer()    writer({"event": "summarize_start", "doc_count": len(state["docs"])})    summary = "LangGraph 是一个与 LangChain 集成的有状态 AI 应用框架，支持检查点和人机交互。"    writer({"event": "summarize_done", "summary_length": len(summary)})    return {"summary": summary}def format_node(state: PipelineState):    writer = get_stream_writer()    writer({"event": "format_start"})    writer({"event": "format_done", "output": f"📋 {state['summary']}"})    return {}pipeline = (    StateGraph(PipelineState)    .add_node("search", search_node)    .add_node("summarize", summarize_node)    .add_node("format", format_node)    .add_edge(START, "search")    .add_edge("search", "summarize")    .add_edge("summarize", "format")    .add_edge("format", END)    .compile())for chunk in pipeline.stream(    {"query": "LangGraph 是什么", "docs": [], "summary": ""},    stream_mode=["custom", "updates"],    version="v2",):    if chunk["type"] == "custom":        data = chunk["data"]        event = data.get("event", "")        print(f"  [custom]  {event}: {data}")    elif chunk["type"] == "updates":        for node_name, node_data in chunk["data"].items():            print(f"  [updates] 节点 [{node_name}] 完成")# ============================================================# 演示4: custom 数据不写入状态# ============================================================print(f"\n{'=' * 60}")print("演示4: custom 数据不写入状态")print("=" * 60)result = graph.invoke({"topic": "LangGraph", "result": ""})print(f"\n  invoke 最终状态: {result}")print("  → custom 数据（stage/progress）不在状态中，只存在于流中")
============================================================演示1: stream_mode='custom' —— 只获取自定义数据============================================================  自定义数据: {'stage': '开始处理', 'detail': '主题: LangGraph'}  自定义数据: {'stage': '正在分析...', 'progress': 30}  自定义数据: {'stage': '正在生成结果...', 'progress': 70}  自定义数据: {'stage': '处理完成', 'progress': 100}============================================================演示2: ['updates', 'custom'] —— 同时获取状态更新和自定义数据============================================================  [custom]  stage=开始处理, progress=-  [custom]  stage=正在分析..., progress=30  [custom]  stage=正在生成结果..., progress=70  [custom]  stage=处理完成, progress=100  [updates] 节点 [process] 返回: {'result': '关于「LangGraph」的分析报告'}============================================================演示3: 多节点图 —— 每个节点发送不同的自定义数据============================================================  [custom]  search_start: {'event': 'search_start', 'query': 'LangGraph 是什么'}  [custom]  search_done: {'event': 'search_done', 'count': 3}  [updates] 节点 [search] 完成  [custom]  summarize_start: {'event': 'summarize_start', 'doc_count': 3}  [custom]  summarize_done: {'event': 'summarize_done', 'summary_length': 51}  [updates] 节点 [summarize] 完成  [custom]  format_start: {'event': 'format_start'}  [custom]  format_done: {'event': 'format_done', 'output': '📋 LangGraph 是一个与 LangChain 集成的有状态 AI 应用框架，支持检查点和人机交互。'}  [updates] 节点 [format] 完成============================================================演示4: custom 数据不写入状态============================================================  invoke 最终状态: {'topic': 'LangGraph', 'result': '关于「LangGraph」的分析报告'}  → custom 数据（stage/progress）不在状态中，只存在于流中

子图输出

要在流式输出中包含来自 子图 的输出，您可以在父图的 .stream() 方法中设置 subgraphs=True。这将同时流式传输父图和任何子图的输出。输出将以元组 (namespace, data) 的形式流式传输，其中 namespace 是一个元组，包含调用子图的节点的路径，例如 ("parent_node:<task_id>", "child_node:<task_id>")。

from langgraph.graph import START, StateGraphfrom typing import TypedDict# Define subgraphclass SubgraphState(TypedDict):    foo: str  # note that this key is shared with the parent graph state    bar: strdef subgraph_node_1(state: SubgraphState):    return {"bar": "bar"}def subgraph_node_2(state: SubgraphState):    return {"foo": state["foo"] + state["bar"]}subgraph_builder = StateGraph(SubgraphState)subgraph_builder.add_node(subgraph_node_1)subgraph_builder.add_node(subgraph_node_2)subgraph_builder.add_edge(START, "subgraph_node_1")subgraph_builder.add_edge("subgraph_node_1", "subgraph_node_2")subgraph = subgraph_builder.compile()# Define parent graphclass ParentState(TypedDict):    foo: strdef node_1(state: ParentState):    return {"foo": "hi! " + state["foo"]}builder = StateGraph(ParentState)builder.add_node("node_1", node_1)builder.add_node("node_2", subgraph)builder.add_edge(START, "node_1")builder.add_edge("node_1", "node_2")graph = builder.compile()for chunk in graph.stream(    {"foo": "foo"},    stream_mode="updates",    # Set subgraphs=True to stream outputs from subgraphs    subgraphs=True,    version="v2",):    if chunk["type"] == "updates":        if chunk["ns"]:            print(f"Subgraph {chunk['ns']}: {chunk['data']}")        else:            print(f"Root: {chunk['data']}")

检查点 (Checkpoints)

使用 checkpoints 流模式在图执行时接收检查点事件。每个检查点事件的格式与 get_state() 的输出相同。需要一个 检查点器。

"""LangGraph 流模式：checkpoints —— 流式传输检查点事件- stream_mode="checkpoints" 在图执行时接收检查点事件- 每个检查点事件的格式与 get_state() 的输出相同- 必须配置 checkpointer（如 InMemorySaver）才能使用"""from typing import Annotatedfrom typing_extensions import TypedDictfrom operator import addfrom langgraph.graph import StateGraph, START, ENDfrom langgraph.checkpoint.memory import InMemorySaverclass State(TypedDict):    query: str    docs: list[str]    summary: strdef search(state: State):    print(f"  [search] 搜索: {state['query']}")    return {"docs": ["文档1: LangGraph 入门指南", "文档2: LangGraph 高级用法"]}def summarize(state: State):    doc_count = len(state["docs"])    print(f"  [summarize] 对 {doc_count} 篇文档进行摘要")    return {"summary": f"共检索到 {doc_count} 篇相关文档"}def format_output(state: State):    print(f"  [format_output] 格式化输出")    return {"summary": state["summary"] + " | 格式化完成"}checkpointer = InMemorySaver()graph = (    StateGraph(State)    .add_node("search", search)    .add_node("summarize", summarize)    .add_node("format_output", format_output)    .add_edge(START, "search")    .add_edge("search", "summarize")    .add_edge("summarize", "format_output")    .add_edge("format_output", END)    .compile(checkpointer=checkpointer))config = {"configurable": {"thread_id": "ckpt-1"}}# ============================================================# 演示1: stream_mode="checkpoints" —— 流式传输检查点事件# ============================================================print("=" * 60)print("演示1: stream_mode='checkpoints' —— 流式传输检查点事件")print("=" * 60)for checkpoint in graph.stream(    {"query": "LangGraph 教程", "docs": [], "summary": ""},    config,    stream_mode="checkpoints",):    config_data = checkpoint["config"]["configurable"]    checkpoint_id = config_data.get("checkpoint_id", "N/A")    checkpoint_ns = config_data.get("checkpoint_ns", "")    values = checkpoint["values"]    next_nodes = checkpoint.get("next", [])    print(f"\n  ▶ 检查点事件:")    print(f"      checkpoint_id : {checkpoint_id[:16]}...")    print(f"      namespace     : '{checkpoint_ns}' {'(根图)' if not checkpoint_ns else '(子图)'}")    print(f"      next          : {next_nodes if next_nodes else '无（执行结束）'}")    print(f"      values        : query={values.get('query', '')}, "          f"docs数量={len(values.get('docs', []))}, "          f"summary={values.get('summary', '')}")# ============================================================# 演示2: checkpoints + updates 同时使用# ============================================================print(f"\n{'=' * 60}")print("演示2: ['checkpoints', 'updates'] —— 同时获取检查点和状态更新")print("=" * 60)config2 = {"configurable": {"thread_id": "ckpt-2"}}for chunk in graph.stream(    {"query": "Python 教程", "docs": [], "summary": ""},    config2,    stream_mode=["checkpoints", "updates"],    version="v2",):    stream_type = chunk["type"]    if stream_type == "updates":        for node_name, node_data in chunk["data"].items():            print(f"  [updates]  节点 [{node_name}] 完成: {node_data}")    elif stream_type == "checkpoints":        next_nodes = chunk["data"].get("next", [])        values = chunk["data"]["values"]        print(f"  [checkpoints] 检查点保存 | next={next_nodes if next_nodes else '结束'} | "              f"summary={values.get('summary', '')}")# ============================================================# 演示3: 对比 get_state() 与 checkpoints 流# ============================================================print(f"\n{'=' * 60}")print("演示3: 对比 get_state() 与 checkpoints 流")print("=" * 60)state = graph.get_state(config2)print(f"\n  get_state() 结果:")print(f"    values: {state.values}")print(f"    next:   {state.next}")print(f"    config: {state.config['configurable']['checkpoint_id'][:16]}...")print(f"\n  → checkpoints 流中每个事件的结构与 get_state() 完全相同")print(f"  → 区别在于 checkpoints 流是实时的，get_state() 是事后的")
============================================================演示1: stream_mode='checkpoints' —— 流式传输检查点事件============================================================  ▶ 检查点事件:      checkpoint_id : 1f17f2b9-bcbd-61...      namespace     : '' (根图)      next          : ['__start__']      values        : query=, docs数量=0, summary=  ▶ 检查点事件:      checkpoint_id : 1f17f2b9-bcc0-6b...      namespace     : '' (根图)      next          : ['search']      values        : query=LangGraph 教程, docs数量=0, summary=  [search] 搜索: LangGraph 教程  ▶ 检查点事件:      checkpoint_id : 1f17f2b9-bcc2-64...      namespace     : '' (根图)      next          : ['summarize']      values        : query=LangGraph 教程, docs数量=2, summary=  [summarize] 对 2 篇文档进行摘要  ▶ 检查点事件:      checkpoint_id : 1f17f2b9-bcc3-64...      namespace     : '' (根图)      next          : ['format_output']      values        : query=LangGraph 教程, docs数量=2, summary=共检索到 2 篇相关文档  [format_output] 格式化输出  ▶ 检查点事件:      checkpoint_id : 1f17f2b9-bcc4-67...      namespace     : '' (根图)      next          : 无（执行结束）      values        : query=LangGraph 教程, docs数量=2, summary=共检索到 2 篇相关文档 | 格式化完成============================================================演示2: ['checkpoints', 'updates'] —— 同时获取检查点和状态更新============================================================  [checkpoints] 检查点保存 | next=['__start__'] | summary=  [checkpoints] 检查点保存 | next=['search'] | summary=  [search] 搜索: Python 教程  [updates]  节点 [search] 完成: {'docs': ['文档1: LangGraph 入门指南', '文档2: LangGraph 高级用法']}  [checkpoints] 检查点保存 | next=['summarize'] | summary=  [summarize] 对 2 篇文档进行摘要  [updates]  节点 [summarize] 完成: {'summary': '共检索到 2 篇相关文档'}  [checkpoints] 检查点保存 | next=['format_output'] | summary=共检索到 2 篇相关文档  [format_output] 格式化输出  [updates]  节点 [format_output] 完成: {'summary': '共检索到 2 篇相关文档 | 格式化完成'}  [checkpoints] 检查点保存 | next=结束 | summary=共检索到 2 篇相关文档 | 格式化完成============================================================演示3: 对比 get_state() 与 checkpoints 流============================================================  get_state() 结果:    values: {'query': 'Python 教程', 'docs': ['文档1: LangGraph 入门指南', '文档2: LangGraph 高级用法'], 'summary': '共检索到 2 篇相关文档 | 格式化完成'}    next:   ()    config: 1f17f2b9-bccb-69...  → checkpoints 流中每个事件的结构与 get_state() 完全相同  → 区别在于 checkpoints 流是实时的，get_state() 是事后的

任务

使用 tasks 流模式在图执行时接收任务开始和结束事件。任务事件包括有关哪个节点正在运行、其结果和任何错误的信息。需要一个 检查点器。

"""LangGraph 流模式：tasks —— 流式传输任务开始和结束事件- stream_mode="tasks" 在图执行时接收任务事件- 任务事件包含：哪个节点正在运行、运行结果、是否有错误- 必须配置 checkpointer（如 InMemorySaver）才能使用"""from typing import Annotatedfrom typing_extensions import TypedDictfrom operator import addfrom langgraph.graph import StateGraph, START, ENDfrom langgraph.checkpoint.memory import InMemorySaverclass State(TypedDict):    query: str    docs: list[str]    summary: str    error_log: strdef search(state: State):    print(f"  [search] 搜索: {state['query']}")    return {"docs": ["文档1: LangGraph 入门指南", "文档2: LangGraph 高级用法"]}def summarize(state: State):    doc_count = len(state["docs"])    print(f"  [summarize] 对 {doc_count} 篇文档进行摘要")    return {"summary": f"共检索到 {doc_count} 篇相关文档"}def format_output(state: State):    print(f"  [format_output] 格式化输出")    return {"summary": state["summary"] + " | 格式化完成"}checkpointer = InMemorySaver()graph = (    StateGraph(State)    .add_node("search", search)    .add_node("summarize", summarize)    .add_node("format_output", format_output)    .add_edge(START, "search")    .add_edge("search", "summarize")    .add_edge("summarize", "format_output")    .add_edge("format_output", END)    .compile(checkpointer=checkpointer))config = {"configurable": {"thread_id": "task-1"}}# ============================================================# 演示1: stream_mode="tasks" —— 流式传输任务事件# ============================================================print("=" * 60)print("演示1: stream_mode='tasks' —— 流式传输任务事件")print("=" * 60)for task in graph.stream(    {"query": "LangGraph 教程", "docs": [], "summary": "", "error_log": ""},    config,    stream_mode="tasks",):    print(f"\n  ▶ 任务事件:")    print(f"      类型     : {type(task).__name__}")    print(f"      完整内容 : {task}")# ============================================================# 演示2: tasks + updates 同时使用（v2 协议）# ============================================================print(f"\n{'=' * 60}")print("演示2: ['tasks', 'updates'] —— 同时获取任务事件和状态更新")print("=" * 60)config2 = {"configurable": {"thread_id": "task-2"}}for chunk in graph.stream(    {"query": "Python 教程", "docs": [], "summary": "", "error_log": ""},    config2,    stream_mode=["tasks", "updates"],    version="v2",):    stream_type = chunk["type"]    if stream_type == "tasks":        task_data = chunk["data"]        print(f"  [tasks] 任务事件: {task_data}")    elif stream_type == "updates":        for node_name, node_data in chunk["data"].items():            print(f"  [updates] 节点 [{node_name}] 完成: {node_data}")# ============================================================# 演示3: tasks + checkpoints + updates 三者组合# ============================================================print(f"\n{'=' * 60}")print("演示3: ['tasks', 'checkpoints', 'updates'] —— 三者组合")print("=" * 60)config3 = {"configurable": {"thread_id": "task-3"}}for chunk in graph.stream(    {"query": "AI 前沿技术", "docs": [], "summary": "", "error_log": ""},    config3,    stream_mode=["tasks", "checkpoints", "updates"],    version="v2",):    stream_type = chunk["type"]    if stream_type == "tasks":        print(f"  [tasks]       任务事件: {chunk['data']}")    elif stream_type == "checkpoints":        next_nodes = chunk["data"].get("next", [])        print(f"  [checkpoints] 检查点保存 | next={next_nodes if next_nodes else '结束'}")    elif stream_type == "updates":        for node_name, node_data in chunk["data"].items():            print(f"  [updates]     节点 [{node_name}] 完成")# ============================================================# 演示4: 带错误的任务事件# ============================================================print(f"\n{'=' * 60}")print("演示4: 带错误的任务事件")print("=" * 60)def risky_node(state: State):    print(f"  [risky_node] 执行可能出错的操作...")    raise ValueError("模拟节点执行出错！")def fallback_node(state: State):    print(f"  [fallback_node] 兜底处理")    return {"error_log": "已执行兜底逻辑"}error_graph = (    StateGraph(State)    .add_node("risky", risky_node)    .add_node("fallback", fallback_node)    .add_edge(START, "risky")    .add_edge("risky", "fallback")    .add_edge("fallback", END)    .compile(checkpointer=InMemorySaver()))config4 = {"configurable": {"thread_id": "task-err-1"}}try:    for chunk in error_graph.stream(        {"query": "测试", "docs": [], "summary": "", "error_log": ""},        config4,        stream_mode=["tasks", "updates"],        version="v2",    ):        stream_type = chunk["type"]        if stream_type == "tasks":            print(f"  [tasks] 任务事件: {chunk['data']}")        elif stream_type == "updates":            for node_name, node_data in chunk["data"].items():                print(f"  [updates] 节点 [{node_name}]: {node_data}")except Exception as e:    print(f"\n  ⚠️ 图执行异常被捕获: {type(e).__name__}: {e}")    print(f"  → tasks 事件中可以观察到节点错误信息")

调试

使用 debug 流模式在图的整个执行过程中尽可能多地流式传输信息。流式输出包括节点的名称和完整状态。

"""LangGraph 流模式：debug —— 流式传输尽可能多的调试信息- stream_mode="debug" 在图的整个执行过程中流式传输所有可用信息- 输出包括：节点名称、完整状态、执行步骤等详细调试数据- 适合深度调试，不建议直接用于生产 UI"""from typing import Annotatedfrom typing_extensions import TypedDictfrom operator import addfrom langgraph.graph import StateGraph, START, ENDfrom langgraph.checkpoint.memory import InMemorySaverclass State(TypedDict):    query: str    docs: list[str]    summary: strdef search(state: State):    print(f"  [search] 搜索: {state['query']}")    return {"docs": ["文档1: LangGraph 入门指南", "文档2: LangGraph 高级用法"]}def summarize(state: State):    doc_count = len(state["docs"])    print(f"  [summarize] 对 {doc_count} 篇文档进行摘要")    return {"summary": f"共检索到 {doc_count} 篇相关文档"}def format_output(state: State):    print(f"  [format_output] 格式化输出")    return {"summary": state["summary"] + " | 格式化完成"}checkpointer = InMemorySaver()graph = (    StateGraph(State)    .add_node("search", search)    .add_node("summarize", summarize)    .add_node("format_output", format_output)    .add_edge(START, "search")    .add_edge("search", "summarize")    .add_edge("summarize", "format_output")    .add_edge("format_output", END)    .compile(checkpointer=checkpointer))config = {"configurable": {"thread_id": "debug-1"}}# ============================================================# 演示1: stream_mode="debug" —— 查看所有调试信息# ============================================================print("=" * 60)print("演示1: stream_mode='debug' —— 查看所有调试信息")print("=" * 60)for debug_event in graph.stream(    {"query": "LangGraph 教程", "docs": [], "summary": ""},    config,    stream_mode="debug",):    print(f"\n  ▶ 调试事件:")    for key, value in debug_event.items():        if key == "values":            print(f"      {key}:")            for k, v in value.items():                print(f"        {k}: {v}")        else:            print(f"      {key}: {value}")# ============================================================# 演示2: 提取关键调试字段 —— 节点名、步骤、状态# ============================================================print(f"\n{'=' * 60}")print("演示2: 提取关键调试字段")print("=" * 60)config2 = {"configurable": {"thread_id": "debug-2"}}for debug_event in graph.stream(    {"query": "Python 教程", "docs": [], "summary": ""},    config2,    stream_mode="debug",):    step = debug_event.get("step", "?")    node_name = debug_event.get("node", "")    values = debug_event.get("values", {})    if node_name:        print(f"\n  ▶ 步骤 {step} | 节点: [{node_name}]")        for k, v in values.items():            print(f"      {k}: {v}")    else:        print(f"\n  ▶ 步骤 {step} | (初始/最终状态)")        for k, v in values.items():            print(f"      {k}: {v}")# ============================================================# 演示3: debug + updates 对比 —— 看 debug 比 updates 多了什么# ============================================================print(f"\n{'=' * 60}")print("演示3: debug vs updates —— 信息量对比")print("=" * 60)config3 = {"configurable": {"thread_id": "debug-3"}}print("\n--- debug 模式输出 ---")debug_count = 0for debug_event in graph.stream(    {"query": "AI 前沿技术", "docs": [], "summary": ""},    config3,    stream_mode="debug",):    debug_count += 1    node = debug_event.get("node", "(无节点)")    step = debug_event.get("step", "?")    print(f"  [{step}] node={node}, keys={list(debug_event.keys())}")print(f"\n  debug 模式共输出 {debug_count} 个事件")print("\n--- updates 模式输出 ---")config4 = {"configurable": {"thread_id": "debug-4"}}updates_count = 0for chunk in graph.stream(    {"query": "AI 前沿技术", "docs": [], "summary": ""},    config4,    stream_mode="updates",):    updates_count += 1    for node_name in chunk:        print(f"  节点: {node_name}")print(f"\n  updates 模式共输出 {updates_count} 个事件")print(f"\n  → debug 输出 {debug_count} 个事件，updates 输出 {updates_count} 个事件")print(f"  → debug 包含更多细节（初始状态、中间状态、每步完整快照）")

同时使用多种模式

您可以将列表作为 stream_mode 参数传递，以同时流式传输多种模式。使用 version="v2" 时，每个块都是一个 StreamPart 字典。使用 chunk["type"] 来区分模式：

"""LangGraph 流模式：同时使用多种模式- 将列表作为 stream_mode 参数传递，可同时流式传输多种模式- 使用 version="v2" 时，每个 chunk 都是统一的 StreamPart 字典：    { "type": str, "ns": tuple, "data": Any }- 通过 chunk["type"] 区分模式：    "values" | "updates" | "messages" | "custom" | "checkpoints" | "tasks" | "debug"- ns 为命名空间元组，子图事件时非空，根图事件为空元组"""from typing import Annotatedfrom typing_extensions import TypedDictfrom operator import addfrom langgraph.graph import StateGraph, START, ENDfrom langgraph.config import get_stream_writerfrom langgraph.checkpoint.memory import InMemorySaverclass State(TypedDict):    query: str    docs: list[str]    summary: str    formatted: strdef search(state: State):    writer = get_stream_writer()    writer({"stage": "search_start", "query": state["query"]})    print(f"  [search] 搜索: {state['query']}")    writer({"stage": "search_done", "count": 2})    return {"docs": ["文档1: LangGraph 入门指南", "文档2: LangGraph 高级用法"]}def summarize(state: State):    writer = get_stream_writer()    writer({"stage": "summarize_start"})    doc_count = len(state["docs"])    print(f"  [summarize] 对 {doc_count} 篇文档进行摘要")    writer({"stage": "summarize_done"})    return {"summary": f"共检索到 {doc_count} 篇相关文档"}def format_output(state: State):    writer = get_stream_writer()    writer({"stage": "format_start"})    result = f"📋 {state['summary']} | 格式化完成"    print(f"  [format_output] 格式化输出")    writer({"stage": "format_done"})    return {"formatted": result}checkpointer = InMemorySaver()graph = (    StateGraph(State)    .add_node("search", search)    .add_node("summarize", summarize)    .add_node("format_output", format_output)    .add_edge(START, "search")    .add_edge("search", "summarize")    .add_edge("summarize", "format_output")    .add_edge("format_output", END)    .compile(checkpointer=checkpointer))config = {"configurable": {"thread_id": "multi-1"}}# ============================================================# 演示1: v2 协议结构 —— 每个 chunk 都是 {type, ns, data}# ============================================================print("=" * 60)print("演示1: v2 协议结构 —— 每个 chunk 都是 {type, ns, data}")print("=" * 60)for chunk in graph.stream(    {"query": "LangGraph 教程", "docs": [], "summary": "", "formatted": ""},    config,    stream_mode=["updates", "custom"],    version="v2",):    print(f"\n  ▶ StreamPart:")    print(f"      type: {chunk['type']}")    print(f"      ns:   {chunk['ns']}")    if chunk["type"] == "custom":        print(f"      data: {chunk['data']}")    elif chunk["type"] == "updates":        for node_name, node_data in chunk["data"].items():            print(f"      data: [{node_name}] {node_data}")# ============================================================# 演示2: updates + custom + values 三者组合# ============================================================print(f"\n{'=' * 60}")print("演示2: ['updates', 'custom', 'values'] —— 三者组合")print("=" * 60)config2 = {"configurable": {"thread_id": "multi-2"}}for chunk in graph.stream(    {"query": "Python 教程", "docs": [], "summary": "", "formatted": ""},    config2,    stream_mode=["updates", "custom", "values"],    version="v2",):    t = chunk["type"]    if t == "custom":        data = chunk["data"]        print(f"  [custom]  stage={data['stage']}")    elif t == "updates":        for node_name, node_data in chunk["data"].items():            print(f"  [updates] 节点 [{node_name}] 完成")    elif t == "values":        data = chunk["data"]        print(f"  [values]  完整状态: query={data['query']}, "              f"docs={len(data['docs'])}篇, "              f"summary={data['summary'] or '(空)'}, "              f"formatted={data['formatted'] or '(空)'}")# ============================================================# 演示3: updates + checkpoints + tasks 三者组合# ============================================================print(f"\n{'=' * 60}")print("演示3: ['updates', 'checkpoints', 'tasks'] —— 三者组合")print("=" * 60)config3 = {"configurable": {"thread_id": "multi-3"}}for chunk in graph.stream(    {"query": "AI 前沿技术", "docs": [], "summary": "", "formatted": ""},    config3,    stream_mode=["updates", "checkpoints", "tasks"],    version="v2",):    t = chunk["type"]    if t == "updates":        for node_name in chunk["data"]:            print(f"  [updates]     节点 [{node_name}] 状态已更新")    elif t == "checkpoints":        next_nodes = chunk["data"].get("next", [])        print(f"  [checkpoints] 检查点保存 | next={next_nodes if next_nodes else '结束'}")    elif t == "tasks":        print(f"  [tasks]       任务事件")# ============================================================# 演示4: 全模式组合 —— 所有可用模式一起使用# ============================================================print(f"\n{'=' * 60}")print("演示4: 全模式组合（不含 messages，因为没有 LLM 调用）")print("=" * 60)config4 = {"configurable": {"thread_id": "multi-4"}}type_counts: dict[str, int] = {}for chunk in graph.stream(    {"query": "全面测试", "docs": [], "summary": "", "formatted": ""},    config4,    stream_mode=["updates", "custom", "values", "checkpoints", "tasks"],    version="v2",):    t = chunk["type"]    type_counts[t] = type_counts.get(t, 0) + 1print(f"\n  各模式输出的 chunk 数量:")for mode, count in type_counts.items():    print(f"    [{mode}] {count} 个")print(f"\n  总计: {sum(type_counts.values())} 个 chunk")# ============================================================# 演示5: v2 的 ns 字段 —— 子图事件时非空# ============================================================print(f"\n{'=' * 60}")print("演示5: v2 的 ns 字段 —— 子图事件时非空")print("=" * 60)class SubState(TypedDict):    text: str    result: strdef sub_node(state: SubState):    return {"result": f"子图处理: {state['text']}"}sub_graph = (    StateGraph(SubState)    .add_node("sub_node", sub_node)    .add_edge(START, "sub_node")    .add_edge("sub_node", END)    .compile())class MainState(TypedDict):    input_text: str    output: strdef main_before(state: MainState):    print(f"  [main_before] 预处理")    return {}def main_call_sub(state: MainState):    result = sub_graph.invoke({"text": state["input_text"], "result": ""})    return {"output": result["result"]}main_graph = (    StateGraph(MainState)    .add_node("before", main_before)    .add_node("call_sub", main_call_sub)    .add_edge(START, "before")    .add_edge("before", "call_sub")    .add_edge("call_sub", END)    .compile())for chunk in main_graph.stream(    {"input_text": "Hello", "output": ""},    stream_mode=["updates"],    version="v2",):    t = chunk["type"]    ns = chunk["ns"]    data = chunk["data"]    ns_label = f"子图{ns}" if ns else "根图"    if t == "updates":        for node_name in data:            print(f"  [{ns_label}] 节点 [{node_name}]")
============================================================演示1: v2 协议结构 —— 每个 chunk 都是 {type, ns, data}============================================================  [search] 搜索: LangGraph 教程  ▶ StreamPart:      type: custom      ns:   ()      data: {'stage': 'search_start', 'query': 'LangGraph 教程'}  ▶ StreamPart:      type: custom      ns:   ()      data: {'stage': 'search_done', 'count': 2}  ▶ StreamPart:      type: updates      ns:   ()      data: [search] {'docs': ['文档1: LangGraph 入门指南', '文档2: LangGraph 高级用法']}  [summarize] 对 2 篇文档进行摘要  ▶ StreamPart:      type: custom      ns:   ()      data: {'stage': 'summarize_start'}  ▶ StreamPart:      type: custom      ns:   ()      data: {'stage': 'summarize_done'}  ▶ StreamPart:      type: updates      ns:   ()      data: [summarize] {'summary': '共检索到 2 篇相关文档'}  [format_output] 格式化输出  ▶ StreamPart:      type: custom      ns:   ()      data: {'stage': 'format_start'}  ▶ StreamPart:      type: custom      ns:   ()      data: {'stage': 'format_done'}  ▶ StreamPart:      type: updates      ns:   ()      data: [format_output] {'formatted': '📋 共检索到 2 篇相关文档 | 格式化完成'}============================================================演示2: ['updates', 'custom', 'values'] —— 三者组合============================================================  [values]  完整状态: query=Python 教程, docs=0篇, summary=(空), formatted=(空)  [search] 搜索: Python 教程  [custom]  stage=search_start  [custom]  stage=search_done  [updates] 节点 [search] 完成  [values]  完整状态: query=Python 教程, docs=2篇, summary=(空), formatted=(空)  [summarize] 对 2 篇文档进行摘要  [custom]  stage=summarize_start  [custom]  stage=summarize_done  [updates] 节点 [summarize] 完成  [values]  完整状态: query=Python 教程, docs=2篇, summary=共检索到 2 篇相关文档, formatted=(空)  [format_output] 格式化输出  [custom]  stage=format_start  [custom]  stage=format_done  [updates] 节点 [format_output] 完成  [values]  完整状态: query=Python 教程, docs=2篇, summary=共检索到 2 篇相关文档, formatted=📋 共检索到 2 篇相关文档 | 格式化完成============================================================演示3: ['updates', 'checkpoints', 'tasks'] —— 三者组合============================================================  [checkpoints] 检查点保存 | next=['__start__']  [checkpoints] 检查点保存 | next=['search']  [tasks]       任务事件  [search] 搜索: AI 前沿技术  [updates]     节点 [search] 状态已更新  [tasks]       任务事件  [checkpoints] 检查点保存 | next=['summarize']  [tasks]       任务事件  [summarize] 对 2 篇文档进行摘要  [updates]     节点 [summarize] 状态已更新  [tasks]       任务事件  [checkpoints] 检查点保存 | next=['format_output']  [tasks]       任务事件  [format_output] 格式化输出  [updates]     节点 [format_output] 状态已更新  [tasks]       任务事件  [checkpoints] 检查点保存 | next=结束============================================================演示4: 全模式组合（不含 messages，因为没有 LLM 调用）============================================================  [search] 搜索: 全面测试  [summarize] 对 2 篇文档进行摘要  [format_output] 格式化输出  各模式输出的 chunk 数量:    [checkpoints] 5 个    [values] 4 个    [tasks] 6 个    [custom] 6 个    [updates] 3 个  总计: 24 个 chunk============================================================演示5: v2 的 ns 字段 —— 子图事件时非空============================================================  [main_before] 预处理  [根图] 节点 [before]  [根图] 节点 [call_sub]

高级

与任何LLM一起使用

import operatorimport jsonfrom typing import TypedDictfrom typing_extensions import Annotatedfrom langgraph.graph import StateGraph, STARTfrom openai import AsyncOpenAIopenai_client = AsyncOpenAI()model_name = "gpt-5.4-mini"async def stream_tokens(model_name: str, messages: list[dict]):    response = await openai_client.chat.completions.create(        messages=messages, model=model_name, stream=True    )    role = None    async for chunk in response:        delta = chunk.choices[0].delta        if delta.role is not None:            role = delta.role        if delta.content:            yield {"role": role, "content": delta.content}# this is our toolasync def get_items(place: str) -> str:    """Use this tool to list items one might find in a place you're asked about."""    writer = get_stream_writer()    response = ""    async for msg_chunk in stream_tokens(        model_name,        [            {                "role": "user",                "content": (                    "Can you tell me what kind of items "                    f"i might find in the following place: '{place}'. "                    "List at least 3 such items separating them by a comma. "                    "And include a brief description of each item."                ),            }        ],    ):        response += msg_chunk["content"]        writer(msg_chunk)    return responseclass State(TypedDict):    messages: Annotated[list[dict], operator.add]# this is the tool-calling graph nodeasync def call_tool(state: State):    ai_message = state["messages"][-1]    tool_call = ai_message["tool_calls"][-1]    function_name = tool_call["function"]["name"]    if function_name != "get_items":        raise ValueError(f"Tool {function_name} not supported")    function_arguments = tool_call["function"]["arguments"]    arguments = json.loads(function_arguments)    function_response = await get_items(**arguments)    tool_message = {        "tool_call_id": tool_call["id"],        "role": "tool",        "name": function_name,        "content": function_response,    }    return {"messages": [tool_message]}graph = (    StateGraph(State)    .add_node(call_tool)    .add_edge(START, "call_tool")    .compile())

为特定聊天模型禁用流式传输

如果您的应用程序混合了支持流式传输的模型和不支持流式传输的模型，您可能需要显式禁用对不支持流式传输的模型的流式传输。在初始化模型时设置 streaming=False。

from langchain.chat_models import init_chat_modelmodel = init_chat_model(    "claude-sonnet-4-6",    # Set streaming=False to disable streaming for the chat model    streaming=False)

entry.title: 子图-langGraph
entry.content:
子图

本指南解释了使用子图的机制。子图是一个在另一个图中用作节点的图。子图适用于：

  • 构建多智能体系统
  • 在多个图中复用一组节点
  • 分布式开发：当您希望不同的团队独立处理图的不同部分时，可以将每个部分定义为子图，只要子图接口（输入和输出模式）得到遵守，就可以构建父图而无需了解子图的任何细节

定义子图通信

添加子图时，您需要定义父图和子图如何通信

模式使用场景状态模式
在节点内调用子图父图和子图具有不同的状态模式（没有共享键），或者您需要在它们之间转换状态您编写一个包装函数，将父状态映射到子图输入，并将子图输出映射回父状态
添加子图作为节点父图和子图共享状态键——子图读取并写入与父图相同的通道您将编译后的子图直接传递给add_node——无需包装函数

在节点内调用子图

当父图和子图具有不同的状态模式（没有共享键）时，在节点函数内调用子图。当您想为多智能体系统中的每个智能体保留私有消息历史记录时，这很常见。节点函数在调用子图之前将父状态转换为子图状态，并在返回之前将结果转换回父状态。

应用场景

主图:  ┌──────────────────────────────────────┐  │ 预处理 → 子图A(翻译) → 审批 → 子图A │  │                         ↑            │  │                    翻译能力复用两次    │  └──────────────────────────────────────┘     主图（清晰易读）:  用户输入 → 检索 → 生成回答 → 质量检查 → 输出质量检查子图（内部复杂逻辑被封装）:  ┌─────────────────────────────────┐  │ 事实核查 → 格式检查 → 敏感词过滤 │  │     ↓ 不通过时循环修改           │  └─────────────────────────────────┘      主图 (平台团队维护):  入口 → 路由 → 子图A(支付团队) → 子图B(物流团队) → 出口子图A (支付团队独立维护):  验证 → 扣款 → 记录 → 通知子图B (物流团队独立维护):  查库存 → 分配仓库 → 生成运单# 翻译子图 —— 可被多个主图复用translation_graph = StateGraph(TranslationState)translation_graph.add_node("detect_language", detect_lang)translation_graph.add_node("translate", translate)translation_graph.add_edge(START, "detect_language")translation_graph.add_edge("detect_language", "translate")translation_graph.add_edge("translate", END)tg = translation_graph.compile()# 主图1: 文档翻译流程doc_graph.add_node("translate_title", tg)  # 复用doc_graph.add_node("translate_body", tg)   # 复用# 主图2: 聊天翻译流程chat_graph.add_node("translate_msg", tg)   # 复用
from typing_extensions import TypedDictfrom langgraph.graph.state import StateGraph, START# Define subgraphclass SubgraphState(TypedDict):    # note that none of these keys are shared with the parent graph state    bar: str    baz: strdef subgraph_node_1(state: SubgraphState):    return {"baz": "baz"}def subgraph_node_2(state: SubgraphState):    return {"bar": state["bar"] + state["baz"]}subgraph_builder = StateGraph(SubgraphState)subgraph_builder.add_node(subgraph_node_1)subgraph_builder.add_node(subgraph_node_2)subgraph_builder.add_edge(START, "subgraph_node_1")subgraph_builder.add_edge("subgraph_node_1", "subgraph_node_2")subgraph = subgraph_builder.compile()# Define parent graphclass ParentState(TypedDict):    foo: strdef node_1(state: ParentState):    return {"foo": "hi! " + state["foo"]}def node_2(state: ParentState):    # Transform the state to the subgraph state    response = subgraph.invoke({"bar": state["foo"]})    # Transform response back to the parent state    return {"foo": response["bar"]}builder = StateGraph(ParentState)builder.add_node("node_1", node_1)builder.add_node("node_2", node_2)builder.add_edge(START, "node_1")builder.add_edge("node_1", "node_2")graph = builder.compile()for chunk in graph.stream({"foo": "foo"}, subgraphs=True, version="v2"):    if chunk["type"] == "updates":        print(chunk["ns"], chunk["data"])

添加子图作为节点

当父图和子图共享状态键时，您可以将编译后的子图直接传递给add_node。无需包装函数——子图会自动读取和写入父图的状态通道。例如，在多智能体系统中，智能体通常通过共享的消息键进行通信。

如果您的子图与父图共享状态键，您可以按照以下步骤将其添加到您的图中：

  1. 定义子图工作流（以下示例中的subgraph_builder）并编译它

  2. 在定义父图工作流时，将编译后的子图传递给add_node方法

    from typing_extensions import TypedDictfrom langgraph.graph.state import StateGraph, STARTclass State(TypedDict):    foo: str# Subgraphdef subgraph_node_1(state: State):    return {"foo": "hi! " + state["foo"]}subgraph_builder = StateGraph(State)subgraph_builder.add_node(subgraph_node_1)subgraph_builder.add_edge(START, "subgraph_node_1")subgraph = subgraph_builder.compile()# Parent graphbuilder = StateGraph(State)builder.add_node("node_1", subgraph)builder.add_edge(START, "node_1")graph = builder.compile()

子图持久性

使用子图时，您需要决定其内部数据在两次调用之间如何处理。考虑一个将任务委托给专业子代理的客户支持机器人：这个“账单专家”子代理应该记住客户之前的提问，还是每次被调用时都重新开始？.compile()上的checkpointer参数控制子图的持久性：

模式检查点器=行为
每次调用None（默认）每次调用都从头开始，并继承父级的检查点器，以支持单次调用内的中断和持久执行。
每线程True状态在同一线程上的不同调用之间累积。每次调用都会从上次中断的地方继续。
无状态False完全没有检查点——像普通函数调用一样运行。没有中断或持久执行。

对于大多数应用程序，每次调用都是正确的选择，包括子代理处理独立请求的多代理系统。当子代理需要多轮对话记忆时（例如，一个通过多次交流建立上下文的研究助理），请使用每线程模式。

有状态

有状态子图继承父图的检查点器，这使得中断、持久执行和状态检查成为可能。这两种有状态模式在状态保留时长方面有所不同。

每次调用（默认）

当子图的每次调用都是独立的，并且子代理不需要记住以前的任何调用时，请使用按调用持久性。这是最常见的模式，特别是对于多代理系统，其中子代理处理一次性请求，如“查找此客户的订单”或“总结此文档”。

省略checkpointer或将其设置为None。

每次调用都从头开始，但在单次调用中，子图继承父级的检查点器，并且可以使用interrupt()暂停和恢复。以下示例使用两个子代理（水果专家、蔬菜专家）作为外部代理的工具：

from langchain.agents import create_agentfrom langchain.tools import toolfrom langgraph.checkpoint.memory import MemorySaverfrom langgraph.types import Command, interrupt@tooldef fruit_info(fruit_name: str) -> str:    """Look up fruit info."""    return f"Info about {fruit_name}"@tooldef veggie_info(veggie_name: str) -> str:    """Look up veggie info."""    return f"Info about {veggie_name}"# Subagents - no checkpointer setting (inherits parent)fruit_agent = create_agent(    model="gpt-5.4-mini",    tools=[fruit_info],    prompt="You are a fruit expert. Use the fruit_info tool. Respond in one sentence.",)veggie_agent = create_agent(    model="gpt-5.4-mini",    tools=[veggie_info],    prompt="You are a veggie expert. Use the veggie_info tool. Respond in one sentence.",)# Wrap subagents as tools for the outer agent@tooldef ask_fruit_expert(question: str) -> str:    """Ask the fruit expert. Use for ALL fruit questions."""    response = fruit_agent.invoke(        {"messages": [{"role": "user", "content": question}]},    )    return response["messages"][-1].content@tooldef ask_veggie_expert(question: str) -> str:    """Ask the veggie expert. Use for ALL veggie questions."""    response = veggie_agent.invoke(        {"messages": [{"role": "user", "content": question}]},    )    return response["messages"][-1].content# Outer agent with checkpointeragent = create_agent(    model="gpt-5.4-mini",    tools=[ask_fruit_expert, ask_veggie_expert],    prompt=(        "You have two experts: ask_fruit_expert and ask_veggie_expert. "        "ALWAYS delegate questions to the appropriate expert."    ),    checkpointer=MemorySaver(),)

每线程

当子代理需要记住之前的交互时，请使用按线程持久性。例如，一个通过多次交流建立上下文的研究助理，或者一个跟踪它已经编辑过的文件的编码助理。子代理的对话历史记录和数据在同一线程上的多次调用中累积。每次调用都会从上次中断的地方继续。使用checkpointer=True进行编译以启用此行为。以下示例使用编译了checkpointer=True的水果专家子代理

from langchain.agents import create_agentfrom langchain.agents.middleware import ToolCallLimitMiddlewarefrom langchain.tools import toolfrom langgraph.checkpoint.memory import MemorySaverfrom langgraph.types import Command, interrupt@tooldef fruit_info(fruit_name: str) -> str:    """Look up fruit info."""    return f"Info about {fruit_name}"# Subagent with checkpointer=True for persistent statefruit_agent = create_agent(    model="gpt-5.4-mini",    tools=[fruit_info],    prompt="You are a fruit expert. Use the fruit_info tool. Respond in one sentence.",    checkpointer=True,)# Wrap subagent as a tool for the outer agent@tooldef ask_fruit_expert(question: str) -> str:    """Ask the fruit expert. Use for ALL fruit questions."""    response = fruit_agent.invoke(        {"messages": [{"role": "user", "content": question}]},    )    return response["messages"][-1].content# Outer agent with checkpointer# Use ToolCallLimitMiddleware to prevent parallel calls to per-thread subagents,# which would cause checkpoint conflicts.agent = create_agent(    model="gpt-5.4-mini",    tools=[ask_fruit_expert],    prompt="You have a fruit expert. ALWAYS delegate fruit questions to ask_fruit_expert.",    middleware=[        ToolCallLimitMiddleware(tool_name="ask_fruit_expert", run_limit=1),    ],    checkpointer=MemorySaver(),)

无状态

当您希望子代理像普通函数调用一样运行，没有检查点开销时，请使用此选项。子图无法暂停/恢复，也无法受益于持久执行。使用checkpointer=False进行编译。

subgraph_builder = StateGraph(...)subgraph = subgraph_builder.compile(checkpointer=False)

检查点器参考

使用.compile()上的checkpointer参数控制子图持久性

subgraph = builder.compile(checkpointer=False)  # or True / None
功能每次调用（默认）每线程无状态
检查点器=无TrueFalse
中断（HITL）✅✅❌
多轮记忆❌✅❌
多次调用（不同子图）✅⚠️✅
多次调用（相同子图）✅❌✅
状态检查⚠️✅❌
  • 中断（HITL）：子图可以使用interrupt()暂停执行并等待用户输入，然后从上次中断的地方恢复。
  • 多轮记忆：子图在同一线程内的多次调用中保留其状态。每次调用都会从上次中断的地方继续，而不是重新开始。
  • 多次调用（不同子图）：可以在单个节点内调用多个不同的子图实例，而不会出现检查点命名空间冲突。
  • 多次调用（相同子图）：可以在单个节点内多次调用相同的子图实例。如果是有状态持久性，这些调用会写入相同的检查点命名空间并发生冲突——请改用每次调用持久性。
  • 状态检查：子图的状态可以通过get_state(config, subgraphs=True)用于调试和监控。

查看子图状态

当您启用持久性时，可以使用子图选项检查子图状态。在无状态检查点（checkpointer=False）下，不保存子图检查点，因此子图状态不可用。

每次调用

from langgraph.graph import START, StateGraphfrom langgraph.checkpoint.memory import MemorySaverfrom langgraph.types import interrupt, Commandfrom typing_extensions import TypedDictclass State(TypedDict):    foo: str# Subgraphdef subgraph_node_1(state: State):    value = interrupt("Provide value:")    return {"foo": state["foo"] + value}subgraph_builder = StateGraph(State)subgraph_builder.add_node(subgraph_node_1)subgraph_builder.add_edge(START, "subgraph_node_1")subgraph = subgraph_builder.compile()  # inherits parent checkpointer# Parent graphbuilder = StateGraph(State)builder.add_node("node_1", subgraph)builder.add_edge(START, "node_1")checkpointer = MemorySaver()graph = builder.compile(checkpointer=checkpointer)config = {"configurable": {"thread_id": "1"}}graph.invoke({"foo": ""}, config)# View subgraph state for the current invocationsubgraph_state = graph.get_state(config, subgraphs=True).tasks[0].state  # Resume the subgraphgraph.invoke(Command(resume="bar"), config)

每线程

from langgraph.graph import START, StateGraph, MessagesStatefrom langgraph.checkpoint.memory import MemorySaver# Subgraph with its own persistent statesubgraph_builder = StateGraph(MessagesState)# ... add nodes and edgessubgraph = subgraph_builder.compile(checkpointer=True)# Parent graphbuilder = StateGraph(MessagesState)builder.add_node("agent", subgraph)builder.add_edge(START, "agent")checkpointer = MemorySaver()graph = builder.compile(checkpointer=checkpointer)config = {"configurable": {"thread_id": "1"}}graph.invoke({"messages": [{"role": "user", "content": "hi"}]}, config)graph.invoke({"messages": [{"role": "user", "content": "what did I say?"}]}, config)# View accumulated subgraph state (includes messages from both invocations)subgraph_state = graph.get_state(config, subgraphs=True).tasks[0].state

流式子图输出

要在流式输出中包含子图的输出，您可以在父图的流式方法中设置子图选项。这将同时流式传输父图和任何子图的输出。

for chunk in graph.stream(    {"foo": "foo"},    subgraphs=True,    stream_mode="updates",):    print(chunk)
from typing_extensions import TypedDictfrom langgraph.graph.state import StateGraph, START# Define subgraphclass SubgraphState(TypedDict):    foo: str    bar: strdef subgraph_node_1(state: SubgraphState):    return {"bar": "bar"}def subgraph_node_2(state: SubgraphState):    # note that this node is using a state key ('bar') that is only available in the subgraph    # and is sending update on the shared state key ('foo')    return {"foo": state["foo"] + state["bar"]}subgraph_builder = StateGraph(SubgraphState)subgraph_builder.add_node(subgraph_node_1)subgraph_builder.add_node(subgraph_node_2)subgraph_builder.add_edge(START, "subgraph_node_1")subgraph_builder.add_edge("subgraph_node_1", "subgraph_node_2")subgraph = subgraph_builder.compile()# Define parent graphclass ParentState(TypedDict):    foo: strdef node_1(state: ParentState):    return {"foo": "hi! " + state["foo"]}builder = StateGraph(ParentState)builder.add_node("node_1", node_1)builder.add_node("node_2", subgraph)builder.add_edge(START, "node_1")builder.add_edge("node_1", "node_2")graph = builder.compile()for chunk in graph.stream(    {"foo": "foo"},    stream_mode="updates",    subgraphs=True,    version="v2",):    if chunk["type"] == "updates":        print(chunk["ns"], chunk["data"])

entry.title: 时间旅行-langGraph
entry.content:
概览

LangGraph 通过 检查点 (checkpoints) 支持时间旅行

  • **重放 (Replay)**：从先前的检查点重试。
  • **分支 (Fork)**：从先前的检查点通过修改状态进行分支，以探索替代路径。

两者都通过从先前的检查点恢复来工作。检查点之前的节点不会重新执行（结果已保存）。检查点之后的节点会重新执行，包括任何 LLM 调用、API 请求和 中断（这可能会产生不同的结果）。

重放

使用先前检查点的配置调用图，以从该点开始重放。

使用 get_state_history 查找您想要从中重放的检查点，然后使用该检查点的配置调用 invoke：

from langgraph.graph import StateGraph, STARTfrom langgraph.checkpoint.memory import InMemorySaverfrom typing_extensions import TypedDict, NotRequiredfrom langchain_core.utils.uuid import uuid7class State(TypedDict):    topic: NotRequired[str]    joke: NotRequired[str]def generate_topic(state: State):    return {"topic": "socks in the dryer"}def write_joke(state: State):    return {"joke": f"Why do {state['topic']} disappear? They elope!"}checkpointer = InMemorySaver()graph = (    StateGraph(State)    .add_node("generate_topic", generate_topic)    .add_node("write_joke", write_joke)    .add_edge(START, "generate_topic")    .add_edge("generate_topic", "write_joke")    .compile(checkpointer=checkpointer))# Step 1: Run the graphconfig = {"configurable": {"thread_id": str(uuid7())}}result = graph.invoke({}, config)# Step 2: Find a checkpoint to replay fromhistory = list(graph.get_state_history(config))# History is in reverse chronological orderfor state in history:    print(f"next={state.next}, checkpoint_id={state.config['configurable']['checkpoint_id']}")# Step 3: Replay from a specific checkpoint# Find the checkpoint before write_jokebefore_joke = next(s for s in history if s.next == ("write_joke",))replay_result = graph.invoke(None, before_joke.config)# write_joke re-executes (runs again), generate_topic does not

分支 (Fork)

分支 (Fork) 从过去的一个检查点创建了一个带有修改状态的新分支。在先前的检查点上调用 update_state 来创建分支，然后使用 None 调用 invoke 以继续执行。

# Find checkpoint before write_jokehistory = list(graph.get_state_history(config))before_joke = next(s for s in history if s.next == ("write_joke",))# Fork: update state to change the topicfork_config = graph.update_state(    before_joke.config,    values={"topic": "chickens"},)# Resume from the fork — write_joke re-executes with the new topicfork_result = graph.invoke(None, fork_config)print(fork_result["joke"])  # A joke about chickens, not socks

从特定节点

当您调用 update_state 时，值会使用指定节点的写入器（包括 归约器 (reducers)）进行应用。检查点会记录该节点产生了此次更新，执行将从该节点的后续节点继续。默认情况下，LangGraph 会根据检查点的版本历史推断 as_node。当从特定检查点进行分支时，此推断几乎总是正确的。在以下情况需要明确指定 as_node：

  • 并行分支：多个节点在同一步骤中更新了状态，且 LangGraph 无法确定哪个是最后一个（InvalidUpdateError）。
  • 无执行历史：在新线程上设置状态（在 测试 中很常见）。
  • 跳过节点：将 as_node 设置为较晚的节点，让图认为该节点已经运行。
# graph: generate_topic -> write_joke# Treat this update as if generate_topic produced it.# Execution resumes at write_joke (the successor of generate_topic).fork_config = graph.update_state(    before_joke.config,    values={"topic": "chickens"},    as_node="generate_topic",)

中断

如果您的图在 人在回路 (human-in-the-loop) 工作流中使用 interrupt，中断在时间旅行期间总是会重新触发。包含中断的节点会重新执行，并且 interrupt() 会暂停以等待新的 Command(resume=...)。

from typing import TypedDictfrom langgraph.checkpoint.memory import InMemorySaverfrom langgraph.constants import STARTfrom langgraph.graph import StateGraphfrom langgraph.types import interrupt, Commandclass State(TypedDict):    value: list[str]def ask_human(state: State):    answer = interrupt("What is your name?")    return {"value": [f"Hello, {answer}!"]}def final_step(state: State):    return {"value": ["Done"]}graph = (    StateGraph(State)    .add_node("ask_human", ask_human)    .add_node("final_step", final_step)    .add_edge(START, "ask_human")    .add_edge("ask_human", "final_step")    .compile(checkpointer=InMemorySaver()))config = {"configurable": {"thread_id": "1"}}# First run: hits interruptgraph.invoke({"value": []}, config)# Resume with answergraph.invoke(Command(resume="Alice"), config)# Replay from before ask_humanhistory = list(graph.get_state_history(config))from rich import print as pprintpprint(history)before_ask = [s for s in history if s.next == ("ask_human",)][-1]print(before_ask)replay_result = graph.invoke(None, before_ask.config)# Pauses at interrupt — waiting for new Command(resume=...)# Fork from before ask_humanfork_config = graph.update_state(before_ask.config, {"value": ["forked"]})fork_result = graph.invoke(None, fork_config)# Pauses at interrupt — waiting for new Command(resume=...)# Resume the forked interrupt with a different answergraph.invoke(Command(resume="Bob"), fork_config)# Result: {"value": ["forked", "Hello, Bob!", "Done"]}

多次中断

如果您的图在多个点收集输入（例如，多步骤表单），您可以从中断之间进行分支，以在不重新询问先前问题的情况下更改后续的回答。

def ask_name(state):    name = interrupt("What is your name?")    return {"value": [f"name:{name}"]}def ask_age(state):    age = interrupt("How old are you?")    return {"value": [f"age:{age}"]}# Graph: ask_name -> ask_age -> final# After completing both interrupts:# Fork from BETWEEN the two interrupts (after ask_name, before ask_age)history = list(graph.get_state_history(config))between = [s for s in history if s.next == ("ask_age",)][-1]fork_config = graph.update_state(between.config, {"value": ["modified"]})result = graph.invoke(None, fork_config)# ask_name result preserved ("name:Alice")# ask_age pauses at interrupt — waiting for new answer
"""LangGraph 多步骤表单 —— 在中断之间分支场景：多步骤表单（姓名→年龄→城市），完成所有步骤后，      可以回退到任意两个中断之间，只修改后面的回答，前面的保留。核心：  1. 正常完成所有中断  2. 从历史中找到"两个中断之间"的检查点  3. update_state 创建分支 → 只修改后面的回答"""from typing import TypedDictfrom langgraph.checkpoint.memory import InMemorySaverfrom langgraph.constants import START, ENDfrom langgraph.graph import StateGraphfrom langgraph.types import interrupt, Commandfrom rich import print as pprint# ============================================================# 定义图和状态# ============================================================class State(TypedDict):    value: list[str]def ask_name(state: State):    name = interrupt("What is your name?")    return {"value": [f"name:{name}"]}def ask_age(state: State):    age = interrupt("How old are you?")    return {"value": [f"age:{age}"]}def ask_city(state: State):    city = interrupt("Where do you live?")    return {"value": [f"city:{city}"]}def finalize(state: State):    summary = " | ".join(state["value"])    print(f"  [finalize] 最终结果: {summary}")    return {"value": [f"summary:{summary}"]}graph = (    StateGraph(State)    .add_node("ask_name", ask_name)    .add_node("ask_age", ask_age)    .add_node("ask_city", ask_city)    .add_node("finalize", finalize)    .add_edge(START, "ask_name")    .add_edge("ask_name", "ask_age")    .add_edge("ask_age", "ask_city")    .add_edge("ask_city", "finalize")    .add_edge("finalize", END)    .compile(checkpointer=InMemorySaver()))config = {"configurable": {"thread_id": "form-1"}}# ============================================================# 步骤1: 正常完成所有中断# ============================================================print("=" * 60)print("步骤1: 正常填写表单（3个中断逐个完成）")print("=" * 60)print("\n--- 第1个中断: 问名字 ---")graph.invoke({"value": []}, config)print("--- resume: Alice ---")graph.invoke(Command(resume="Alice"), config)print("--- resume: 25 ---")graph.invoke(Command(resume="25"), config)print("--- resume: Beijing ---")result = graph.invoke(Command(resume="Beijing"), config)print(f"\n  ✅ 完整结果: {result['value']}")# ============================================================# 步骤2: 查看所有检查点历史# ============================================================print(f"\n{'=' * 60}")print("步骤2: 查看所有检查点历史")print("=" * 60)history = list(graph.get_state_history(config))for i, snapshot in enumerate(history):    print(f"\n  [{i}] next={snapshot.next}")    print(f"      values={snapshot.values}")    print(f"      config_checkpoint_id={snapshot.config['configurable']['checkpoint_id'][:12]}...")# ============================================================# 步骤3: 从 ask_age 之前分支 —— 修改年龄和城市，名字保留# ============================================================print(f"\n{'=' * 60}")print("步骤3: 从 ask_age 之前分支")print("  → 名字保留 Alice，重新回答年龄和城市")print("=" * 60)# 找到 ask_age 之前的检查点（next 指向 ask_age）between = [s for s in history if s.next == ("ask_age",)][-1]print(f"\n  找到检查点: next={between.next}")print(f"  此时 values={between.values}")print(f"  ↑ 名字 Alice 已经保存，从这里分支")# 修改 state（可选），创建分支fork_config = graph.update_state(between.config, {"value": ["name:Alice", "forked"]})print(f"\n  fork_config 创建成功")print(f"  修改后 values: {graph.get_state(fork_config).values}")# 从分支继续执行 → 在 ask_age 中断print(f"\n--- 从分支继续 → 中断在 ask_age ---")fork_result = graph.invoke(None, fork_config)snap = graph.get_state(fork_config)print(f"  中断在: {snap.next}")# 重新回答年龄print(f"\n--- resume 新年龄: 30 ---")graph.invoke(Command(resume="30"), fork_config)# 重新回答城市print(f"\n--- resume 新城市: Shanghai ---")result = graph.invoke(Command(resume="Shanghai"), fork_config)print(f"\n  ✅ 分支结果: {result['value']}")print(f"  ↑ 名字保留 name:Alice，年龄和城市已更新")# ============================================================# 步骤4: 从 ask_city 之前分支 —— 只修改城市# ============================================================print(f"\n{'=' * 60}")print("步骤4: 从 ask_city 之前分支")print("  → 名字和年龄保留，只修改城市")print("=" * 60)# 找到 ask_city 之前的检查点between_city = [s for s in history if s.next == ("ask_city",)][-1]print(f"\n  找到检查点: next={between_city.next}")print(f"  此时 values={between_city.values}")fork_config2 = graph.update_state(between_city.config, None)print(f"\n--- 从分支继续 → 中断在 ask_city ---")graph.invoke(None, fork_config2)print(f"\n--- resume 新城市: Shenzhen ---")result = graph.invoke(Command(resume="Shenzhen"), fork_config2)print(f"\n  ✅ 分支结果: {result['value']}")print(f"  ↑ 名字和年龄保留，只有城市变了")# ============================================================# 对比三种结果# ============================================================print(f"\n{'=' * 60}")print("三种结果对比")print("=" * 60)print(f"""  原始:     name:Alice | age:25  | city:Beijing  分支1:    name:Alice | age:30  | city:Shanghai  (从 ask_age 前分支)  分支2:    name:Alice | age:25  | city:Shenzhen  (从 ask_city 前分支)    ↑ 每次分支都保留了前面的回答，只修改后面的""")# ============================================================# 总结# ============================================================print(f"{'=' * 60}")print("中断之间分支 要点")print("=" * 60)print("""  1. 每个 interrupt 都会创建一个检查点     ask_name 完成后 → 检查点A (next=ask_age)     ask_age 完成后 → 检查点B (next=ask_city)     ask_city 完成后 → 检查点C (next=finalize)  2. 通过 get_state_history 找到目标检查点     [s for s in history if s.next == ("ask_age",)][-1]  3. update_state 创建分支     fork_config = graph.update_state(target.config, {...})     → 基于目标检查点创建新的执行线     → 前面的结果保留，后面的重新回答  4. 应用场景:     - 多步骤表单: 修改后面步骤的回答     - A/B 测试: 同一输入，不同后续路径     - 纠错: 发现后面步骤填错了，回退重填""")

子图

使用 子图 (subgraphs) 的时间旅行取决于子图是否有自己的检查器。这决定了您可以从中进行时间旅行的检查点的粒度。

默认情况下，子图继承父级的检查器。父级将整个子图视为一个 单一超级步骤 —— 整个子图执行只有一个父级检查点。从子图之前进行时间旅行会从头重新执行它。您无法时间旅行到默认子图中节点之间的点 —— 您只能从父级进行时间旅行。

# Subgraph without its own checkpointer (default)subgraph = (    StateGraph(State)    .add_node("step_a", step_a)       # Has interrupt()    .add_node("step_b", step_b)       # Has interrupt()    .add_edge(START, "step_a")    .add_edge("step_a", "step_b")    .compile()  # No checkpointer — inherits from parent)graph = (    StateGraph(State)    .add_node("subgraph_node", subgraph)    .add_edge(START, "subgraph_node")    .compile(checkpointer=InMemorySaver()))config = {"configurable": {"thread_id": "1"}}# Complete both interruptsgraph.invoke({"value": []}, config)            # Hits step_a interruptgraph.invoke(Command(resume="Alice"), config)  # Hits step_b interruptgraph.invoke(Command(resume="30"), config)     # Completes# Time travel from before the subgraphhistory = list(graph.get_state_history(config))before_sub = [s for s in history if s.next == ("subgraph_node",)][-1]fork_config = graph.update_state(before_sub.config, {"value": ["forked"]})result = graph.invoke(None, fork_config)# The entire subgraph re-executes from scratch# You cannot time travel to a point between step_a and step_b

entry.title: 中断-langGraph
entry.content:
概念

中断允许您在特定点暂停图执行，并在继续之前等待外部输入。这实现了需要外部输入才能继续的人机交互模式。当中断被触发时，LangGraph 使用其持久化层保存图状态，并无限期等待，直到您恢复执行。

中断通过在图节点的任何位置调用 interrupt() 函数来工作。该函数接受任何可 JSON 序列化的值，该值将呈现给调用者。当您准备好继续时，通过使用 Command 重新调用图来恢复执行，该命令随后成为节点内部 interrupt() 调用的返回值。

与静态断点（在特定节点之前或之后暂停）不同，中断是动态的：它们可以放置在代码中的任何位置，并且可以根据您的应用程序逻辑设置条件。

  • 检查点保留您的位置：检查点记录器会写入确切的图状态，以便您以后可以恢复，即使是在错误状态下也是如此。
  • thread_id 是您的指针：设置 config={"configurable": {"thread_id": ...}} 以告诉检查点记录器加载哪个状态。
  • 中断负载通过 chunk["interrupts"] 呈现：在使用 version="v2" 进行流式传输时，您传递给 interrupt() 的值会出现在 values 流部分的 interrupts 字段中，以便您了解图正在等待什么。

您选择的 thread_id 实际上是您的持久光标。重复使用它可以恢复同一个检查点；使用新值则会以空状态启动一个全新的线程。

使用 interrupt 暂停

interrupt 函数会暂停图执行并向调用者返回一个值。当您在节点中调用 interrupt 时，LangGraph 会保存当前的图状态并等待您通过输入恢复执行。要使用 interrupt，您需要：

  1. 一个检查点记录器 (checkpointer) 来持久化图状态（在生产环境中使用持久化检查点记录器）
  2. 配置中的 **线程 ID (thread ID)**，以便运行时知道从哪个状态恢复
  3. 在您想要暂停的地方调用 interrupt()（负载必须是可 JSON 序列化的）
from langgraph.types import interruptdef approval_node(state: State):    # Pause and ask for approval    approved = interrupt("Do you approve this action?")    # When you resume, Command(resume=...) returns that value here    return {"approved": approved}
"""LangGraph interrupt() 中断机制演示interrupt() 用于在图执行过程中暂停，等待外部输入。调用后图立即停止，返回当前状态，后续可通过 Command(resume=...) 恢复。"""from typing_extensions import TypedDictfrom langgraph.graph import StateGraph, START, ENDfrom langgraph.checkpoint.memory import InMemorySaverfrom langgraph.types import interrupt, Commandfrom langchain_core.runnables import RunnableConfig# ============================================================# 场景1: 基础中断# ============================================================class State(TypedDict):    action: str    approved: bool    result: strdef prepare_action(state: State):    print("  [prepare_action] 准备操作中...")    return {"action": "删除数据库表 users"}def human_approval(state: State):    print(f"  [human_approval] 需要审批: {state['action']}")    decision = interrupt({        "question": "是否允许执行以下操作？",        "action": state["action"],    })    return {"approved": decision}def execute_action(state: State):    if state["approved"]:        print(f"  [execute_action] ✅ 审批通过，执行: {state['action']}")        return {"result": f"已执行: {state['action']}"}    else:        print(f"  [execute_action] ❌ 审批拒绝，跳过")        return {"result": "操作已取消"}g1 = StateGraph(State)g1.add_node(prepare_action)g1.add_node(human_approval)g1.add_node(execute_action)g1.add_edge(START, "prepare_action")g1.add_edge("prepare_action", "human_approval")g1.add_edge("human_approval", "execute_action")g1.add_edge("execute_action", END)checkpointer1 = InMemorySaver()graph1 = g1.compile(checkpointer=checkpointer1)print("=" * 60)print("场景1: 基础中断 —— interrupt() 暂停图执行")print("=" * 60)config1: RunnableConfig = {"configurable": {"thread_id": "demo-1"}}print("
--- 执行图（遇到 interrupt 自动暂停）---")result = graph1.invoke({"action": "", "approved": False, "result": ""}, config1)print(f"
  invoke 返回值: {result}")# 中断后查看图状态snapshot = graph1.get_state(config1)print(snapshot)print(f"
  中断后的图状态:")print(f"    状态值: {snapshot.values}")print(f"    下一个待执行节点: {snapshot.next}")print(f"    中断信息: {snapshot.tasks[0].interrupts if snapshot.tasks else '无'}")

[human_approval] 需要审批: 删除数据库表 users  invoke 返回值: {'action': '删除数据库表 users', 'approved': False, 'result': '', '__interrupt__': [Interrupt(value={'question': '是否允许执行以下操作？', 'action': '删除数据库表 users'}, id='427ab3559d50f68a7f32cc5f52dad918')]}StateSnapshot(values={'action': '删除数据库表 users', 'approved': False, 'result': ''}, next=('human_approval',), config={'configurable': {'thread_id': 'demo-1', 'checkpoint_ns': '', 'checkpoint_id': '1f17c324-acb8-645a-8001-d5444ad49013'}}, metadata={'source': 'loop', 'step': 1, 'parents': {}}, created_at='2026-07-10T07:38:07.025654+00:00', parent_config={'configurable': {'thread_id': 'demo-1', 'checkpoint_ns': '', 'checkpoint_id': '1f17c324-acb6-698b-8000-91aec185b7d6'}}, tasks=(PregelTask(id='35db6205-52e0-20e9-d75b-06d546dc1e5b', name='human_approval', path=('__pregel_pull', 'human_approval'), error=None, interrupts=(Interrupt(value={'question': '是否允许执行以下操作？', 'action': '删除数据库表 users'}, id='427ab3559d50f68a7f32cc5f52dad918'),), state=None, result=None),), interrupts=(Interrupt(value={'question': '是否允许执行以下操作？', 'action': '删除数据库表 users'}, id='427ab3559d50f68a7f32cc5f52dad918'),))  中断后的图状态:    状态值: {'action': '删除数据库表 users', 'approved': False, 'result': ''}    下一个待执行节点: ('human_approval',)    中断信息: (Interrupt(value={'question': '是否允许执行以下操作？', 'action': '删除数据库表 users'}, id='427ab3559d50f68a7f32cc5f52dad918'),)

当您调用 interrupt 时，会发生以下情况

  1. 图执行被挂起，就在调用 interrupt 的确切位置
  2. 状态被保存，使用检查点记录器以便以后可以恢复执行。在生产环境中，这应该是一个持久化检查点记录器（例如由数据库支持）
  3. 值被返回给调用者，位于 __interrupt__ 下；它可以是任何可 JSON 序列化的值（字符串、对象、数组等）
  4. 图无限期等待，直到您带着响应恢复执行
  5. 响应被传回到节点中，当您恢复时，它成为 interrupt() 调用的返回值

恢复中断

在中断暂停执行后，您通过再次调用图并包含 Command（其中包含恢复值）来恢复图。恢复值被传回给 interrupt 调用，允许节点使用外部输入继续执行。

from langgraph.types import Command# Initial run - hits the interrupt and pauses# thread_id is the persistent pointer (stores a stable ID in production)config = {"configurable": {"thread_id": "thread-1"}}result = graph.invoke({"input": "data"}, config=config, version="v2")# result is a GraphOutput with .value and .interrupts# .interrupts contains the payloads passed to interrupt()print(result.interrupts)# > (Interrupt(value='Do you approve this action?'),)# Resume with the human's response# The resume payload becomes the return value of interrupt() inside the nodegraph.invoke(Command(resume=True), config=config, version="v2")
"""LangGraph interrupt() 中断机制演示interrupt() 用于在图执行过程中暂停，等待外部输入。调用后图立即停止，返回当前状态，后续可通过 Command(resume=...) 恢复。"""from typing_extensions import TypedDictfrom langgraph.graph import StateGraph, START, ENDfrom langgraph.checkpoint.memory import InMemorySaverfrom langgraph.types import interrupt, Commandfrom langchain_core.runnables import RunnableConfig# ============================================================# 场景1: 基础中断# ============================================================class State(TypedDict):    action: str    approved: bool    result: strdef prepare_action(state: State):    print("  [prepare_action] 准备操作中...")    return {"action": "删除数据库表 users"}def human_approval(state: State):    print(f"  [human_approval] 需要审批: {state['action']}")    decision = interrupt({        "question": "是否允许执行以下操作？",        "action": state["action"],    })    return {"approved": decision}def execute_action(state: State):    if state["approved"]:        print(f"  [execute_action] ✅ 审批通过，执行: {state['action']}")        return {"result": f"已执行: {state['action']}"}    else:        print(f"  [execute_action] ❌ 审批拒绝，跳过")        return {"result": "操作已取消"}g1 = StateGraph(State)g1.add_node(prepare_action)g1.add_node(human_approval)g1.add_node(execute_action)g1.add_edge(START, "prepare_action")g1.add_edge("prepare_action", "human_approval")g1.add_edge("human_approval", "execute_action")g1.add_edge("execute_action", END)checkpointer1 = InMemorySaver()graph1 = g1.compile(checkpointer=checkpointer1)print("=" * 60)print("场景1: 基础中断 —— interrupt() 暂停图执行")print("=" * 60)config1: RunnableConfig = {"configurable": {"thread_id": "demo-1"}}print("
--- 执行图（遇到 interrupt 自动暂停）---")result = graph1.invoke({"action": "", "approved": False, "result": ""}, config1)print(f"
  invoke 返回值: {result}")# 中断后查看图状态snapshot = graph1.get_state(config1)print(snapshot)print(f"
  中断后的图状态:")print(f"    状态值: {snapshot.values}")print(f"    下一个待执行节点: {snapshot.next}")print(f"    中断信息: {snapshot.tasks[0].interrupts if snapshot.tasks else '无'}")# ============================================================# 恢复中断# ============================================================print(f"
{'=' * 60}")print("恢复中断 —— Command(resume=...) 让图继续执行")print("=" * 60)print("
--- 恢复执行，传入审批结果 True ---")print("  Command(resume=True) → interrupt() 返回 True → approved=True")result = graph1.invoke(    Command(resume=True),    config1,)print(f"
  恢复后 invoke 返回值: {result}")print(f"  最终 result: {result['result']}")# 验证：图已完成snapshot_after = graph1.get_state(config1)print(f"
  恢复后的图状态:")print(f"    状态值: {snapshot_after.values}")print(f"    下一个待执行节点: {snapshot_after.next}")print(f"    ↑ next 为空，说明图已执行完毕")
============================================================场景1: 基础中断 —— interrupt() 暂停图执行============================================================--- 执行图（遇到 interrupt 自动暂停）---  [prepare_action] 准备操作中...  [human_approval] 需要审批: 删除数据库表 users  invoke 返回值: {'action': '删除数据库表 users', 'approved': False, 'result': '', '__interrupt__': [Interrupt(value={'question': '是否允许执行以下操作？', 'action': '删除数据库表 users'}, id='6e42daec15bfafd8d9aacebd8db4c539')]}StateSnapshot(values={'action': '删除数据库表 users', 'approved': False, 'result': ''}, next=('human_approval',), config={'configurable': {'thread_id': 'demo-1', 'checkpoint_ns': '', 'checkpoint_id': '1f17c32b-30a1-6e98-8001-9f80105dba66'}}, metadata={'source': 'loop', 'step': 1, 'parents': {}}, created_at='2026-07-10T07:41:01.918983+00:00', parent_config={'configurable': {'thread_id': 'demo-1', 'checkpoint_ns': '', 'checkpoint_id': '1f17c32b-30a0-6684-8000-60a13a3eef9f'}}, tasks=(PregelTask(id='5cf66e92-aaba-552e-cd55-625e8322f3e8', name='human_approval', path=('__pregel_pull', 'human_approval'), error=None, interrupts=(Interrupt(value={'question': '是否允许执行以下操作？', 'action': '删除数据库表 users'}, id='6e42daec15bfafd8d9aacebd8db4c539'),), state=None, result=None),), interrupts=(Interrupt(value={'question': '是否允许执行以下操作？', 'action': '删除数据库表 users'}, id='6e42daec15bfafd8d9aacebd8db4c539'),))  中断后的图状态:    状态值: {'action': '删除数据库表 users', 'approved': False, 'result': ''}    下一个待执行节点: ('human_approval',)    中断信息: (Interrupt(value={'question': '是否允许执行以下操作？', 'action': '删除数据库表 users'}, id='6e42daec15bfafd8d9aacebd8db4c539'),)============================================================恢复中断 —— Command(resume=...) 让图继续执行============================================================--- 恢复执行，传入审批结果 True ---  Command(resume=True) → interrupt() 返回 True → approved=True  [human_approval] 需要审批: 删除数据库表 users  [execute_action] ✅ 审批通过，执行: 删除数据库表 users  恢复后 invoke 返回值: {'action': '删除数据库表 users', 'approved': True, 'result': '已执行: 删除数据库表 users'}  最终 result: 已执行: 删除数据库表 users  恢复后的图状态:    状态值: {'action': '删除数据库表 users', 'approved': True, 'result': '已执行: 删除数据库表 users'}    下一个待执行节点: ()    ↑ next 为空，说明图已执行完毕

关于恢复的关键点

  • 恢复时必须使用与发生中断时相同的 线程 ID
  • 传递给 Command(resume=...) 的值成为 interrupt 调用的返回值
  • 恢复时，节点会从调用 interrupt 的节点开头重新开始，因此 interrupt 之前的任何代码都会再次运行
  • 您可以将任何可 JSON 序列化的值作为恢复值传递

常见模式

中断开启的关键功能是能够暂停执行并等待外部输入。这对于多种用例都很有用，包括：

  • 审批工作流：在执行关键操作（API 调用、数据库更改、财务交易）之前暂停
  • 处理多个中断：在单次调用中恢复多个中断时，将中断 ID 与恢复值配对
  • 审阅并编辑：在继续之前让人员审阅并修改 LLM 输出或工具调用
  • 中断工具调用：在执行工具调用之前暂停，以便审阅并编辑工具调用
  • 验证人工输入：在进行下一步之前暂停，以验证人工输入

结合人机交互 (HITL) 中断进行流式传输

在构建具有人机交互工作流的交互式智能体时，您可以同时流式传输消息块和节点更新，以便在处理中断时提供实时反馈。将多种流模式（"messages" 和 "updates"）与 subgraphs=True（如果存在子图）结合使用，可以：

  • 实时流式传输 AI 生成的响应
  • 检测图何时遇到中断
  • 无缝处理用户输入并恢复执行
async for chunk in graph.astream(    initial_input,    stream_mode=["messages", "updates"],    subgraphs=True,    config=config,    version="v2",):    if chunk["type"] == "messages":        # Handle streaming message content        msg, _ = chunk["data"]        if isinstance(msg, AIMessageChunk) and msg.content:            display_streaming_content(msg.content)    elif chunk["type"] == "updates":        # Check for interrupts in the updates data        if "__interrupt__" in chunk["data"]:            interrupt_info = chunk["data"]["__interrupt__"][0].value            user_response = get_user_input(interrupt_info)            initial_input = Command(resume=user_response)            break        else:            current_node = list(chunk["data"].keys())[0]
"""LangGraph: 人机交互 (HITL) 中断 + 流式传输演示如何在流式输出中处理 interrupt 中断，实现"边执行边输出，遇到审批暂停，人工确认后继续"的效果。"""from typing import Annotatedfrom typing_extensions import TypedDictfrom langgraph.graph import StateGraph, START, ENDfrom langgraph.checkpoint.memory import InMemorySaverfrom langgraph.types import interrupt, Commandfrom langgraph.types import StreamModefrom langchain_core.runnables import RunnableConfigfrom langchain_core.messages import HumanMessage, AIMessage, AnyMessagefrom operator import add# ============================================================# 定义状态# ============================================================class State(TypedDict):    messages: Annotated[list[AnyMessage], add]    pending_action: str    action_result: str# ============================================================# 节点定义# ============================================================def chatbot(state: State):    """AI 聊天节点：根据用户消息生成回复"""    last_msg = state["messages"][-1].content if state["messages"] else ""    if "删除" in last_msg or "drop" in last_msg.lower():        reply = AIMessage(content="检测到危险操作，我需要先让你确认一下。")        return {            "messages": [reply],            "pending_action": f"执行: {last_msg}",        }    else:        reply = AIMessage(content=f"好的，我来处理: {last_msg}")        return {"messages": [reply], "pending_action": ""}def human_review(state: State):    """人工审核节点：中断等待确认"""    if not state["pending_action"]:        return {"action_result": "无需审核"}    decision = interrupt({        "type": "approval",        "message": "请确认是否执行以下操作？",        "action": state["pending_action"],    })    return {"action_result": "approved" if decision else "rejected"}def execute(state: State):    """执行节点：根据审核结果执行"""    result = state["action_result"]    if result == "approved":        msg = AIMessage(content=f"✅ 已执行: {state['pending_action']}")    elif result == "rejected":        msg = AIMessage(content=f"❌ 已取消: {state['pending_action']}")    else:        msg = AIMessage(content="操作完成")    return {"messages": [msg], "pending_action": ""}# ============================================================# 路由逻辑# ============================================================def needs_review(state: State) -> str:    """判断是否需要人工审核"""    if state["pending_action"]:        return "human_review"    return ENDdef after_review(state: State) -> str:    """审核后进入执行"""    return "execute"# ============================================================# 构建图# ============================================================workflow = StateGraph(State)workflow.add_node(chatbot)workflow.add_node(human_review)workflow.add_node(execute)workflow.add_edge(START, "chatbot")workflow.add_conditional_edges("chatbot", needs_review, {    "human_review": "human_review",    END: END,})workflow.add_edge("human_review", "execute")workflow.add_edge("execute", END)checkpointer = InMemorySaver()graph = workflow.compile(checkpointer=checkpointer)# ============================================================# 演示1: 普通消息 —— 不触发中断，流式输出# ============================================================print("=" * 60)print("演示1: 普通消息 —— 流式输出，无中断")print("=" * 60)config1: RunnableConfig = {"configurable": {"thread_id": "stream-1"}}print("
用户: 帮我查询今天的天气")print("AI 回复 (流式):")for mode, chunk in graph.stream(    {"messages": [HumanMessage(content="帮我查询今天的天气")]},    config1,    stream_mode=["messages", "updates"],):    if mode == "messages":        msg, metadata = chunk        if hasattr(msg, "content") and msg.content and isinstance(msg, AIMessage):            print(f"  [token] {msg.content}", end="")    elif mode == "updates":        passprint("
")# ============================================================# 演示2: 危险操作 —— 触发中断，流式 + 人工确认# ============================================================print(f"
{'=' * 60}")print("演示2: 危险操作 —— 流式输出 + 中断等待人工确认")print("=" * 60)config2: RunnableConfig = {"configurable": {"thread_id": "stream-2"}}print("
用户: 删除所有用户数据")print("AI 回复 (流式):")got_interrupt = Falsefor mode, chunk in graph.stream(    {"messages": [HumanMessage(content="删除所有用户数据")]},    config2,    stream_mode=["updates", "debug"],):    if mode == "updates":        node_name = list(chunk.keys())[0]        node_data = chunk[node_name]        if "messages" in node_data:            for msg in node_data["messages"]:                print(f"  [{node_name}] {msg.content}")        if "pending_action" in node_data and node_data["pending_action"]:            print(f"  [{node_name}] 待执行操作: {node_data['pending_action']}")    if mode == "debug":        if chunk.get("type") == "task" and "interrupt" in str(chunk.get("payload", {})).lower():            got_interrupt = True# 检查是否中断snapshot = graph.get_state(config2)if snapshot.next:    print(f"
  ⚠️ 图已中断！等待人工审核...")    print(f"  中断在节点: {snapshot.next}")    if snapshot.tasks:        for t in snapshot.tasks:            if t.interrupts:                for intr in t.interrupts:                    print(f"  中断详情: {intr.value}")    # ===== 人工确认 =====    print(f"
{'─' * 60}")    print("人工审核: 确认执行 ✅")    print(f"{'─' * 60}")    print("
恢复执行 (流式):")    for mode, chunk in graph.stream(        Command(resume=True),        config2,        stream_mode=["updates"],    ):        if mode == "updates":            node_name = list(chunk.keys())[0]            node_data = chunk[node_name]            if "messages" in node_data:                for msg in node_data["messages"]:                    print(f"  [{node_name}] {msg.content}")else:    print("
  图正常结束，无中断")# ============================================================# 演示3: 危险操作 —— 人工拒绝# ============================================================print(f"
{'=' * 60}")print("演示3: 危险操作 —— 人工拒绝 ❌")print("=" * 60)config3: RunnableConfig = {"configurable": {"thread_id": "stream-3"}}print("
用户: DROP TABLE users")print("AI 回复 (流式):")for mode, chunk in graph.stream(    {"messages": [HumanMessage(content="DROP TABLE users")]},    config3,    stream_mode=["updates"],):    if mode == "updates":        node_name = list(chunk.keys())[0]        node_data = chunk[node_name]        if "messages" in node_data:            for msg in node_data["messages"]:                print(f"  [{node_name}] {msg.content}")snapshot = graph.get_state(config3)if snapshot.next:    print(f"
  ⚠️ 图已中断！")    if snapshot.tasks:        for t in snapshot.tasks:            if t.interrupts:                print(f"  中断详情: {t.interrupts[0].value}")    print(f"
{'─' * 60}")    print("人工审核: 拒绝执行 ❌")    print(f"{'─' * 60}")    print("
恢复执行 (流式):")    for mode, chunk in graph.stream(        Command(resume=False),        config3,        stream_mode=["updates"],    ):        if mode == "updates":            node_name = list(chunk.keys())[0]            node_data = chunk[node_name]            if "messages" in node_data:                for msg in node_data["messages"]:                    print(f"  [{node_name}] {msg.content}")# ============================================================# 总结# ============================================================print(f"
{'=' * 60}")print("HITL + 流式传输 要点")print("=" * 60)print("""  1. stream_mode=["updates"] → 按节点输出流式展示     stream_mode=["messages"] → 按 token 流式展示（适合 LLM）     stream_mode=["debug"]    → 调试信息，可检测 interrupt  2. 流式过程中遇到 interrupt → 流自动停止     → 通过 get_state() 检查是否中断     → 通过 Command(resume=...) 恢复     → 恢复后继续 stream() 获取后续输出  3. 典型流程:     stream() → 看到 AI 回复 → 发现中断 → 人工决策 → stream(resume) → 继续""")
============================================================演示1: 普通消息 —— 流式输出，无中断============================================================用户: 帮我查询今天的天气AI 回复 (流式):  [token] 好的，我来处理: 帮我查询今天的天气============================================================演示2: 危险操作 —— 流式输出 + 中断等待人工确认============================================================用户: 删除所有用户数据AI 回复 (流式):  [chatbot] 检测到危险操作，我需要先让你确认一下。  [chatbot] 待执行操作: 执行: 删除所有用户数据  ⚠️ 图已中断！等待人工审核...  中断在节点: ('human_review',)  中断详情: {'type': 'approval', 'message': '请确认是否执行以下操作？', 'action': '执行: 删除所有用户数据'}────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────人工审核: 确认执行 ✅────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────恢复执行 (流式):  [execute] ✅ 已执行: 执行: 删除所有用户数据============================================================演示3: 危险操作 —— 人工拒绝 ❌============================================================用户: DROP TABLE usersAI 回复 (流式):  [chatbot] 检测到危险操作，我需要先让你确认一下。  ⚠️ 图已中断！  中断详情: {'type': 'approval', 'message': '请确认是否执行以下操作？', 'action': '执行: DROP TABLE users'}────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────人工审核: 拒绝执行 ❌────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────恢复执行 (流式):  [execute] ❌ 已取消: 执行: DROP TABLE users============================================================HITL + 流式传输 要点============================================================  1. stream_mode=["updates"] → 按节点输出流式展示     stream_mode=["messages"] → 按 token 流式展示（适合 LLM）     stream_mode=["debug"]    → 调试信息，可检测 interrupt  2. 流式过程中遇到 interrupt → 流自动停止     → 通过 get_state() 检查是否中断     → 通过 Command(resume=...) 恢复     → 恢复后继续 stream() 获取后续输出  3. 典型流程:     stream() → 看到 AI 回复 → 发现中断 → 人工决策 → stream(resume) → 继续
  • **version="v2"**：所有块都是具有 type、ns 和 data 键的 StreamPart 字典
  • **chunk["type"]**：细化流模式（"messages"、"updates" 等）以便进行类型推断
  • **chunk["ns"]**：标识源图（根图为空元组，子图则有值）
  • **subgraphs=True**：检测嵌套图中的中断时需要此项
  • **Command(resume=...)**：使用用户提供的数据恢复图执行

处理多个中断

当并行分支同时中断时（例如，扇出到多个节点，每个节点都调用 interrupt()），您可能需要在单次调用中恢复多个中断。在单次调用中恢复多个中断时，请将每个中断 ID 映射到其恢复值。这可确保每个响应在运行时与正确的中断配对。

"""LangGraph 处理多个中断场景：  1. 顺序中断 —— 节点A中断 → 恢复 → 节点B中断 → 恢复  2. 并行中断 —— 同一超步骤中多个节点同时中断  3. 动态中断 —— 根据条件决定是否中断"""from typing import Annotatedfrom typing_extensions import TypedDictfrom langgraph.graph import StateGraph, START, ENDfrom langgraph.checkpoint.memory import InMemorySaverfrom langgraph.types import interrupt, Commandfrom langchain_core.runnables import RunnableConfigfrom operator import add# ============================================================# 场景1: 顺序中断 —— 一个接一个# ============================================================class OrderState(TypedDict):    name: str    age: str    email: str    summary: strdef collect_name(state: OrderState):    print("  [collect_name] 需要输入姓名")    name = interrupt("请输入你的姓名:")    print(f"  [collect_name] 收到: {name}")    return {"name": name}def collect_age(state: OrderState):    print(f"  [collect_age] 姓名={state['name']}，需要输入年龄")    age = interrupt("请输入你的年龄:")    print(f"  [collect_age] 收到: {age}")    return {"age": age}def collect_email(state: OrderState):    print(f"  [collect_email] 姓名={state['name']}，需要输入邮箱")    email = interrupt("请输入你的邮箱:")    print(f"  [collect_email] 收到: {email}")    return {"email": email}def summarize(state: OrderState):    summary = f"姓名={state['name']}, 年龄={state['age']}, 邮箱={state['email']}"    print(f"  [summarize] 汇总完成: {summary}")    return {"summary": summary}g1 = StateGraph(OrderState)g1.add_node(collect_name)g1.add_node(collect_age)g1.add_node(collect_email)g1.add_node(summarize)g1.add_edge(START, "collect_name")g1.add_edge("collect_name", "collect_age")g1.add_edge("collect_age", "collect_email")g1.add_edge("collect_email", "summarize")g1.add_edge("summarize", END)cp1 = InMemorySaver()graph1 = g1.compile(checkpointer=cp1)# ============================================================# 场景2: 并行中断 —— 同一超步骤多个节点同时中断# ============================================================print("=" * 60)class ParallelState(TypedDict):    left_result: str    right_result: str    final: strdef left_node(state: ParallelState):    print("  [left] 需要输入")    result = interrupt("左侧分支: 请输入A的值?")    print(f"  [left] 收到: {result}")    return
